title: いつかは憧れのウマ娘に！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear Special Week and Tokai Teio talking inside
the classroom. They sound like they're having
fun...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And, and... the whole time, Suzuka was so cooool!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah, I know already. You just can't get
enough of Suzuka, can you, Spe?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But she's just so great! I wanna be an amazing
Umamusume just like her!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Although I'm a little stuck on how to actually do
that... Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Maybe start by copying her? Heck, if you do that,
maybe you'll end up like her! You know, fake it
till you make it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Fake it till I make it... Okay, I'll give it a try!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hohoho! What do you think?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You're totally off! Suzuka would definitely strike
a more refined pose. And she wouldn't laugh like
that!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Th-then how about this?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, yeah! That's more like it! And jazz it up with
a Teio Step!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Got it! One Teio Step coming righ—wha?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I was just playing with ya! ♪ I think you've got it,
though. Why don't you try acting like Suzuka for
the rest of the day?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: SPEEEEE! Perfect timing, mi amiga!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I've found a super delicious taco place, so let's
head over there on our way home!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, hello there, El. Ehehe, you're as hyper as
eve—Ahem. How are you?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
A delicious taco restaurant? That sounds
intriguing.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What's up with the way you're talking? Did
you hit your head on the bedpost this morning or
something?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. Tacos sound great. I'll go with you, but
I'd like to be alone.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're comin' with me, but you want to be
alone? Qué?! What are you talkin' abo—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I do want to go. I want to go beyond that
delicious taco restaurant, to a place no one has
ever seen before.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You wanna go where?! What's beyond the taco place?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Wait! Spe?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week stubbornly keeps up the Silence
Suzuka act for quite some time.
